new_example: The company experienced a dramatic increase in sales after the launch.
new_translation: Công ty đã đạt mức tăng doanh số đột biến sau đợt ra mắt.

old_example: The cost of international shipping has increased dramatically due to the recent global energy and financial crisis globally recently today.
new_example: The cost of shipping has increased dramatically due to the crisis.
new_translation: Phí vận chuyển đã tăng mạnh do cuộc khủng hoảng.

old_example: The international trade fair manage managed to draw thousands of global visitors and exhibitors from all around the world recently today.
new_example: The trade fair managed to draw thousands of global visitors.
new_translation: Hội chợ thương mại đã thu hút hàng ngàn du khách toàn cầu.

old_example: A major drawback of the new international expansion plan is the high cost of logistics and operational management globally recently today.
new_example: A major drawback of the plan is the high cost of logistics.
new_translation: Một nhược điểm lớn của kế hoạch là chi phí hậu cần cao.

old_example: Drawing innovative ideas from international customer feedback is essential for the future success and growth of our company globally today.
new_example: Drawing ideas from customer feedback is essential for future success.
new_translation: Việc thu thập ý tưởng từ khách hàng là thiết yếu cho thành công.

old_example: The young entrepreneur managed to achieve his dream of building a successful international technology corporation globally recently yesterday morning today.
new_example: The entrepreneur achieved his dream of building a successful corporation.
new_translation: Doanh nhân đã đạt được ước mơ xây dựng một tập đoàn thành công.

old_example: She wore a smart silk dress and international accessories for the formal business dinner held at the luxury hotel tonight today.
new_example: She wore a smart silk dress for the formal dinner.
new_translation: Cô đã mặc một chiếc váy lụa sang trọng cho bữa tối trang trọng.

old_example: She placed a jewelry box on top of the oak dresser in her bedroom.
new_example: She placed a jewelry box on top of the dresser.
new_translation: Cô ấy đã đặt một chiếc hộp trang sức lên trên tủ.

old_example: Please remember to drink plenty of water to ensure your health and well-being during the long international flight yesterday afternoon.
new_example: Please remember to drink plenty of water during the long flight.
new_translation: Vui lòng nhớ uống nhiều nước trong suốt chuyến bay dài.

old_example: The flight attendants will serve a variety of complimentary international hot and cold drinks during the long-distance global flight today.
new_example: The flight attendants will serve a variety of hot and cold drinks.
new_translation: Tiếp viên hàng không sẽ phục vụ nhiều loại đồ uống nóng và lạnh.

old_example: He walked into the house dripping wet after getting caught in a sudden summer thunderstorm.
new_example: He walked into the house dripping wet after the storm.
new_translation: Anh ấy bước vào nhà trong tình trạng ướt sũng sau cơn bão.
